This paper presents a new quantization method f
kernel accumulators.  Two constraints to maximize t
accumulator size are introduced. Using these constrain
ﬁxed-point approximations is proposed.  Only soluti
are tested. We have evaluated our quantization met
and have demonstrated that 16-bit accumulators ar
the narrow accumulators with our quantization techn
good classiﬁcation performance. The mapping on an
near-ideal throughput scaling is possible by using 16-
these ﬁndings for designing eﬃcient accelerators and p
application domains.
